title: Katha solla poren lyrics Deiva Thirumagal Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Chiyaan Vikram, Shringa S
Lyricist: Na. Muthukumar 
Song: Katha solla poren
Movie: Deivathirumagal
Music: GV Prakash

Katha solla poren, katha solla poren
enna kathappaa..
Raaja Raani katha sollapporen, 
kaakka kuruvi katha solla poraen

Raja kathaiya!! kaakkaa kathaiyaa
enna katha, enna katha

kathaiyaa athellam ethukku, sollaatha sollaatha
Yaaravuhu thirudi padamaa eduthuthaangana

Kaakkaa katha sollu.. kaakkaa katha sollu..
Raja katha sollu, Rajadhi Raja ilaiyaraja katha sollu

Orey oru oorukulla, orey oru rajavaam
orey oru rajavaa? oorla vera yaarum illaya
hmmmm irukaanga
Raajavoda manthiringa 4 perum koojavaam
koojaava !!!

Orey oru oorukulla, orey oru rajavaam
Raajavoda manthiringa 4 perum koojavaam
Naatila poar vanthathu, poarila sanda nadakuthu
Naatila poar vanthathu, poarila sanda nadakuthu
sandaiyil gundu vedikuthu..dom.. dom.. dom.
sandaiyaa.. ethuku
sanda thaan ethuku nadanthuchu
sanda thaan ethuku nadanthuchu 
Kaakkaa vadaiya thirudiruchula athaan athaan
sanda thaan ethuku nadanthuchu
kaakkaathaan vadaiya thirudichu
nariyumthaan paada solluchu.. sa re ga ma paa
kaakkaa paadichaa 
o paadaathaa? sari
kaa kaa kaa ...
aiyo vada pochey kaakkaa paavamla
Raja viduvaraa !!!!

Rajaa pattu paada, nari vadaiya poda
namma rajakitta Kakka thanks sollichu
oorellam sernthu kondaatamthaan
nariyoda thittam thindatamthaan
naadellam vazhthuthu raja vaazhgha ..
raaja vaazhgha, raaja vaazhgha

Ithu raja kathaiyaa ?  kakkaa kathaiya ? 
kaakkaa raajaa katha ... 
kaakkaa raajaa vaazhga, kaakkaa raajaa vaazhgha,

Nenachu nenachu nan katha solla
sirichu sirichu nee atha ketka
Innum katha irukku enkitta
kaetu kaetu nee paaraatta

Orey oru oorukulla, orey oru rajavaam
Raajavoda manthiringa 4 perum 
aiyoo.. thirumbavum athey raajaa kathaiyaa !!!
Ithu antha raajaa illa, vera raajaa

Intha raajaaku enna katha
superman superman, atha sollatha, atha sollatha
anakonda kathaiya sollu, anakonda kathaiya sollu
yaar sir yaar sir aahh dinosaur

Naatula romba naalaa dinosaur thollainnu
makkal raajaakitta ponaanga..
dinosaura vetaiyaada superman pola maari
Raajaava poga solli ketaanga

Vazhi ellam anakonda bayam kaatuthu
atha thaandi ponaaru puyal thaakkuthu
vazhiellam anakonda payam kaatuthu
atha thaandi ponaaru puyal thaakkuthu
puyal thaandipponaaru puli urumuthu
raajavin saththathil puli pathunguthu

Naadellam vaazhthuthu raajaa vaazhga..
kaakkaa raaja vaazhga.. kaakkaa raaja vaazhga
appa.. pothumpaa vittudupa

Muzhichi muzhichi naan katha solla
madakki madakki nee atha kaetka
innum katha irukku enkitta
kaetu kaetu nee paaraatta

Orey oru oorukulla, orey oru rajavaam
raajaavoda katha kaetu thoonguthu nilaavaam
.......
.......

Thirumba thirumba naa katha solla
thoongi  thoongi nee atha kaettka
innum katha irukku en kitta
kaetu kaetu nee paaraatta

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Katha Solla Poren?

The song revolves around storytelling, capturing the innocence and imagination of a child.

Who are the singers of this song?

Vikram and Shringa S lend their voices to this beautiful track.

Who composed the music for Deiva Thirumagal?

The music was composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

What is the release year of the movie Deiva Thirumagal?

The movie was released in 2011.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song highlights the bond between a father and his daughter, emphasizing love and imagination.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Deiva Thirumagal, Katha Solla Poren is a touching song that showcases the tender relationship between a father and his daughter. The song is set in a context where storytelling becomes a medium of connection and love. With Vikram's heartfelt rendition and Shringa S's sweet vocals, the song evokes emotions of warmth and nostalgia. Na Muthukumar's lyrics beautifully capture the innocence of childhood, while GV Prakash Kumar's composition adds a soothing melody to the narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Katha Solla Poren from Deiva Thirumagal is a heartwarming melody that beautifully captures the essence of storytelling through music. Sung by the versatile Vikram and Shringa S, this song is a testament to Na Muthukumar's lyrical genius and GV Prakash Kumar's soulful composition. Dive into a world of nostalgia and warmth with this enchanting track.
stanzaMeanings: I'm going to tell a story, I'm going to tell a story, what story, dad? I'll tell a king and queen story, I'll tell a crow and sparrow story.
Is it a king's story or a crow's story? What story, what story?
Why tell stories like that? Don't tell, don't tell. Someone stole and made a movie.
Tell the crow story, tell the crow story. Tell the king story, tell the story of the king of kings, Ilaiyaraja.
In one town, there was only one king. Was there only one king? Wasn't there anyone else in the town? Hmm, there were four ministers with the king, all making noise!

In one town, there was only one king. The king's four ministers were making noise. A war came to the country, and a fight happened in the war. A bomb exploded in the fight... dom... dom... dom. Why the fight? Why did it happen? The crow stole the vadai, that's why the fight happened. The crow stole the vadai, and the fox asked it to sing... sa re ga ma pa. Did the crow sing or not? Oh no, the vadai fell, poor crow. Will the king forgive?
The king sang a song, the fox ate the vadai. Everyone thanked the crow and celebrated. The fox's plan was to eat. The whole country praised the king... long live the king, long live the king.
Is this a king's story? A crow's story? Long live the crow king, long live the crow king.
Thinking and thinking, I tell the story, laughing and laughing, you listen to it. There are more stories with me, keep listening and praising.
In one town, there was only one king. The king's four ministers... oh no, it's the same king's story again! This is not that king, it's another king.
What's the story for this king? Superman, superman, don't tell that, don't tell that. Tell the anaconda story, tell the anaconda story. Who sir, who sir, ahh dinosaur.
For a long time in the country, people complained to the king about the dinosaur. They asked the king to hunt it like Superman.

The path was full of fear of the anaconda, but he crossed it, and a storm hit. The path was full of fear of the anaconda, but he crossed it, and a storm hit. He crossed the storm, and the tiger roared, but it hid from the king's voice.
The dinosaur had to die, why did the tiger die?
The whole country praised, long live the king... long live the crow king, long live the crow king. Dad... that's enough, let it go.
Telling the story with excitement, you listen with interest. There are more stories with me, keep listening and praising.
In one town, there was only one king. Listening to the king's story, the moon fell asleep.
Telling the story again and again, you listen while sleeping. There are more stories with me, keep listening and praising.
